automaticNetwork.description: Daily-cached public tag lookup so SessionStart can surface an in-session update notice when a newer Hyperflow release exists.
automaticNetwork.trigger: SessionStart / session.after_clear / session.after_compact via hooks/session-start → scripts/hook-runtime.py
automaticNetwork.cacheContents: latest public semver tag string only (no repo contents, no credentials)
automaticNetwork.payloadSent: none beyond the standard git ls-remote handshake to the public remote
automaticNetwork.failureBehavior: OSError, SubprocessError, timeout, or non-zero exit → latest left empty; no update notice; session continues (non-blocking)
automaticNetwork.offlineBehavior: HYPERFLOW_HOOK_OFFLINE or --offline skips network; stale cache outside TTL is not used as a fresh claim

optionalNetwork.description: Gated specialist web research via the host's web_search / web_fetch tools (or inventory equivalents). Not a plugin-owned HTTP client.
optionalNetwork.trigger: Specialist agents only when flow ∈ {deep, research, scientific}, triage security:true, or audit/deploy; skipped when specialists.webResearch.enabled=false, offline, or cache-fresh
optionalNetwork.method: host-bound web_research (WebSearch/WebFetch or provider inventory equivalents)
optionalNetwork.destination: sites chosen by the host search/fetch tools for the specialist question (CVE advisories, docs, release notes)
optionalNetwork.failureBehavior: graceful skip with logged reason; chain continues; never invent citations

userInvokedNetwork.description: Optional one-shot installer clones the public Hyperflow repo and writes local config/shims. Does not stay resident.
userInvokedNetwork.method: git clone / curl|bash bootstrap of install.sh
userInvokedNetwork.destination: https://github.com/Mohammed-Abdelhady/hyperflow.git (and raw.githubusercontent.com for the bootstrap URL when used)

userInvokedNetwork.description: Host marketplace install/update/remove commands suggested after an update notice or run by the user via their editor plugin manager.
userInvokedNetwork.method: codex/claude plugin marketplace commands or source git pull --ff-only
userInvokedNetwork.destination: host marketplace registries / public git remote when the user opts to update

userInvokedNetwork.description: User-invoked skills (issue, pr, deploy, handoff, audit) may run local git and optional gh CLI against the user's remotes.
userInvokedNetwork.method: git / gh CLI as invoked by the skill under user direction
userInvokedNetwork.destination: user's configured git remotes and GitHub API via gh (user credentials already on the machine)

userInvokedNetwork.description: Maintainer release/verification scripts contact GitHub when a human runs them; not part of plugin runtime.
userInvokedNetwork.method: git / gh / curl as scripted for releases
userInvokedNetwork.destination: https://github.com/Mohammed-Abdelhady/hyperflow and downstream repos listed in RELEASING.md

notPluginOwned.description: Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and related hosts send prompts to their configured LLM providers. Hyperflow shapes prompt content but does not proxy, intercept, or retransmit that traffic.
Any analytics, crash reporting, or telemetry emitted by the host editor or LLM provider is outside Hyperflow. This plugin ships no analytics SDK and claims no control over host telemetry.

localhostOnly.description: hyperflow view serves the local artefact viewer bound to 127.0.0.1 only. viewer/app.js fetch() loads local paths; no outbound upload.

automaticWrites.when: SessionStart update check succeeds and returns a tag

automaticWrites.contents: local diagnostic lines from migrate/archive/memory/bridge helpers
bundled profile/architecture/conventions heads for the session
recovery snapshot of active tasks/specs/decisions + local git diff stats
plugin version that last migrated the project cache

automaticWrites.when: SessionStart migrate-cache.py when stubs/copy missing or doctrine stale
automaticWrites.contents: empty stubs or refreshed read-only doctrine copy from the plugin
SHA256 + line counts of memory files
moved stale tasks/audits/specs/features; cleanup timestamp marker; promoted learnings into memory
managed hyperflow doctrine block only (markers preserve user content outside the block)

userInvokedWrites.contents: phase/role/token counts/context hash — no prompts, file contents, or secrets

userInvokedWrites.when: install.sh / setup-detection.sh when user opts in
